description.zh-Hans: 接受单个原型图块，通过扰动种子生成N个变体，排列为水平条、垂直条或网格布局。适用于从单个生成节点快速生成图块集。
description.en: Takes a single prototype tile and generates N variations by perturbing the seed, arranged in a horizontal strip, vertical strip, or grid layout. Useful for quickly producing tile sets from a single generator node.

triggers.zh-Hans: 自动瓦片, 图块变体, 图块集, 瓦片布局
triggers.en: auto tile, tile variations, tileset, tile layout

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 将一个生成节点输出作为原型，生成多个带随机变化的图块变体，用于瓦片集制作。
exampleUsage.en: Feed a generator node output as a prototype to produce multiple tile variations with seeded randomness for tileset creation.
